Service.title: Service
Service.description: Financial service or custom mortgage portfolio option offered by Praveen Kumar

id.description: Unique identifier of the service item

titleEn.description: Title of the service in English

titleMl.description: Title of the service in Malayalam

descEn.description: Short description of the service in English

descMl.description: Short description of the service in Malayalam

detailEn.description: Comprehensive details of the service in English

detailMl.description: Comprehensive details of the service in Malayalam

custom.description: Whether the service was added by an admin at runtime

NewsItem.title: NewsItem
NewsItem.description: Financial insights article or informative update on LIC/mortgage policies

id.description: Unique identifier of the news item

titleEn.description: Title of the article in English

titleMl.description: Title of the article in Malayalam

authorEn.description: Author of the article in English

authorMl.description: Author of the article in Malayalam

custom.description: Whether the article was custom written

Review.title: Review
Review.description: User feedback, testimonial, and professional rating for Praveen Kumar

id.description: Unique identifier of the feedback submission

name.description: Name of the client who submitted rating

designationEn.description: Profession/title of the reviewer in English

designationMl.description: Profession/title of the reviewer in Malayalam

approved.description: Whether the review is approved for public display

custom.description: True if submitted dynamically by consumer

ContactEnquiry.title: ContactEnquiry
ContactEnquiry.description: Consultation inquiry / mortgage request submitted by a prospective client

date.description: Date and time of enquiry creation

services.description: Collection of mortgage/financial consulting service objects

news.description: Collection of policy guidelines, articles and update insights

reviews.description: Collection of client ratings and testimonial reviews

enquiries.description: Registered contact/mortgage consultation entries from consumers
